title: Hugo's Colorful Snacks
synopsis: Hugo discovers colorful foods and learns about different colors through delicious snacks like red apples, yellow bananas, and green peas.

pages.text: Hugo loves snacks! Look at all the colors!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes sits at a colorful table with rainbow colored food items scattered around, dominant rainbow splashes with paint splatter drips creating a joyful finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Hugo sitting at a colorful table with various snacks

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes holding a bright red apple, red paint splatters dominate the scene with splashy painterly strokes and dripping paint effects creating a sensory visual experience
Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes peeling a yellow banana, bright yellow paint dominates with joyful splashes and finger paint texture drips throughout the illustration
Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes eating green peas from a bowl, vibrant green paint splatters dominate with splashy painterly effects and pure color exploration drips
Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes reaching for blue blueberries, deep blue paint dominates the scene with sensory visual splashes and finger paint aesthetic drips

pages.text: Hugo loves colorful food! What color will he eat next?

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes surrounded by rainbow colored foods, all colors swirling together in splashy painterly strokes with joyful paint splatter drips creating pure color exploration

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color is the apple Hugo eats?
questions.explanation: The apple is red! Hugo goes crunch, crunch with his red apple.

questions.question: What yellow food does Hugo enjoy?
questions.explanation: Hugo peels and eats a yellow banana! It's so yummy!

questions.question: What sound do the green peas make?
questions.explanation: The green peas go pop, pop, pop when Hugo eats them!
